rationale: Educ. Code §28.0252 governs high school GPA computation methodology. It has no relation to property tax homestead exemptions or Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: The commissioner shall develop a standard method of computing a student's high school grade point average that provides for additional weight to be given to each honors course, advanced placement course, international baccalaureate course, OnRamps dual enrollment course, or dual credit course completed by a student.
_note: Rule text is unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption change; no overlap in subject matter.
